Privacy Policy

Last updated: March 2026

Information We Collect

This site does not require user registration. We may collect anonymous usage data through analytics services to improve the site experience.

Cookies

We may use cookies for analytics purposes. You can disable cookies in your browser settings.

Third-Party Services

We may use Google Analytics or similar services to understand site traffic. These services may collect anonymized data about your visit.

Children's Privacy

This site does not knowingly collect personal information from children under 13 years of age.

Contact

For privacy concerns, contact us at privacy@bizarre-lineage.com.
